utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each one is fully specified according to what should be covered under each item: property includes details and price; financing includes terms and fees; legal_services lists service type and cost; moving_services lists arrangements and cost; setup_services lists utilities and cost; total_budget gives a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, all six items are covered and fully detailed.
